message:
feat(diagnostics): add onboarding scorecard and enrichment tests to runtime diagnostics CLI

Add onboarding readiness assessment infrastructure (+440 lines):

- OnboardingReadinessClass enum (Ready/Conditional/Blocked) with
  Display and serde support for rollout readiness classification
- OnboardingRemediationEffort enum (Low/Medium/High) for coarse
  effort estimates during onboarding triage
- OnboardingScorecardSignal struct for deterministic external signals
  merged into scorecard evaluation
- OnboardingScorecard and OnboardingScorecardOutput structs with
  schema versioning, signal aggregation, and readiness verdict
- ONBOARDING_SCORECARD_SCHEMA_VERSION constant for artifact versioning

Test enrichment:
- Comprehensive serde roundtrip and Display tests for all new types
- Scorecard construction, signal merging, and verdict computation
- Schema version consistency validation
- Edge cases for empty signal sets and mixed readiness inputs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
